rows.label: qev010401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Ahhh~ What should I do... No
matter how I look at it, there
aren't enough parts...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Y-Yes, welcome! Please
take a seat right here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Um, we're actually sold out of
espresso and cafe lattes today.
Is that alright with you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0010
rows.name: Agree

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod and say anything is fine.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0020
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask why they are sold out.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0004
rows.name: You're a really nice person...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0005
rows.name:
No... But... That's no good! You
came all the way here, so I want
you to drink whatever you like...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0006
rows.name:
You're quite the nosy
customer, aren't you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0007
rows.name:
It's not so much why as it is...
I can't make them... Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0008
rows.name: A-Are you good with machines?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0009
rows.name:
You just look like someone
who would be really good with
machines. Well, are you?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0031
rows.name: Answer that you are fairly confident.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0041
rows.name: Answer that you aren't very confident.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I knew it! My eyes didn't
deceive me after all...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Eh? But you're definitely
better than me! Right?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0012
rows.name:
...I'm just really bad with machines...
Well, not just machines...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I ended up breaking the
espresso machine we just had
issued to us the other day...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0014
rows.name:
It looks like it can be fixed if I
just had the parts... But they seem
pretty hard to get ahold of...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Um... do you happen to know
where I can find...
Ultra-heat-resistant stainless piping?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Oh, thank goodness! It
really doesn't hurt to ask.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Once the espresso machine is fixed,
I'll make you the most delicious cafe
latte ever. So... please help me out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0018
rows.name:
I submitted requests for ages...
And the espresso machine finally
arrived at the shop...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Um... Once it's fixed, I'll make you a delicious
cafe latte... So please, make sure you get that
Ultra-heat-resistant stainless piping.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0020
rows.name:
The manager just asked me why the
espresso machine is missing...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Ahhh~ If I don't fix it soon, my
crimes are going to be exposed...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0050
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell Latte you brought the
parts and cheer her up.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0060
rows.name: Point Out

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Point out that she still hasn't
told the shop about breaking it.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0022
rows.name:
R-Really?! Unlike me, you seem like someone
who's really capable at their job![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0023
rows.name: Um, hurry and show me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0024
rows.name:
It was something they went out of their way to get
for us, and I broke it before even making a single
cup... I feel too guilty to tell the manager...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Um... so how about it? Were you
unable to get the Ultra-heat-resistant
stainless piping after all?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0026
rows.name:
This is it! Thank you!
Thank you so much!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Now I'll be able to serve espresso
and all sorts of other things![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Oh, right! Please
wait here for a second![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0029
rows.name:
I'll go make you a delicious
cafe latte as thanks![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0071
rows.name: Accept Latte's kind offer.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline Latte's kind offer.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0030
rows.name: You really know what's up! I'm so happy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0031
rows.name:
...I mean, most BLADEs prefer alcohol
over a good cup of tea... so they rarely
ever order something like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0032
rows.name:
I'll put my skills to work and
make you the best cup ever![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Please don't hold back! I mean,
I need a guinea pig before
serving it to everyone else...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Ah, never mind! It won't take long,
so please stay and have a drink![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Let's see... It's been getting
a bit hot lately, so an iced
one would be better, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Hehe! You'll be surprised, you know? I
might be bad with machines, but... I'm
actually a pretty capable barista![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0037
rows.name: Gya... GYAAAAAAAAAAH!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Hey! Latte! Where do
you think you're going?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0090
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0091
rows.name: Ask what on earth happened to Latte.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0100
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0101
rows.name:
Ask Bergamot various
questions about herself.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0039
rows.name:
Just when I thought she went
into the kitchen, she suddenly
let out a scream and ran off...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Well, she probably broke another
piece of cooking equipment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0041
rows.name:
From the shop's cash register to a customer's
terminal... Latte has destroyed just about
every single thing in this shop.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0042
rows.name:
At this point, no matter what she
breaks, I'm not even surprised anymore.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0043
rows.name: I'm the owner of this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0044
rows.name:
Unlike other cafes, our shop brews coffee
using only highly purified water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0045
rows.name:
We don't use those easily obtainable
synthetic beans either. We use pure coffee
beans grown from scratch in a plant...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0046
rows.name:
...You see, this shop is very important to
me, filled with all my particular standards.
...Though Latte keeps destroying it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0047
rows.name:
...So, are you an acquaintance
of Latte's? If so, could you
go check on her for me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0048
rows.name:
I can't leave the shop... so
please tell her to hurry back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0049
rows.name:
I'm sorry! I'm sorry! Oh, God! Why do I
end up breaking everything I touch?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0050
rows.name: Ah... You're the customer from before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Um... I'm sorry! Even though I took
your order for an iced cafe latte...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0052
rows.name:
When I tried to get the ice...
Um... I broke the refrigerator...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0110
rows.name: Surprise

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0111
rows.name:
Ask her how one even manages
to break a refrigerator.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0120
rows.name: Encourage

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0121
rows.name:
Comfort her by saying it
happens all the time.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0053
rows.name: I don't know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0054
rows.name:
Maybe I'm equipped with some
special ability that emits
super static electricity...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0055
rows.name:
That's why the espresso machine,
the refrigerator... They all break
just by me touching them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0056
rows.name:
Oh, God! Why have you
given me such a trial?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0057
rows.name:
R-Really?! You must be quite
the destroyer yourself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0058
rows.name:
Hehe, we're comrades... right? If you
don't mind, want to apologize to God
together as fellow destroyers...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0059
rows.name:
...Eh? The manager wants me
to come back to the shop?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0060
rows.name:
No way... After causing so
much trouble, I don't know how
I can face her this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0061
rows.name:
If I at least had an L-002 Fuel Tank
to repair the refrigerator, I might
have the courage to go back, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0062
rows.name:
...I'm sorry. Could you fetch
something for me again? You're the
only one I can rely on right now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0063
rows.name:
I'll be right here praying to God until
you return with the L-002 Fuel Tank...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0064
rows.name:
Praying that He lifts this curse
of destruction placed upon me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0065
rows.name:
Ugh... I just want to serve everyone
delicious tea as a barista![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0066
rows.name:
Um... I just got a call
from the manager...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0067
rows.name:
...She's probably angry, right?
Is she... going to abandon me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0130
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0131
rows.name: Nod and say that might be the case.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0140
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0141
rows.name: Reassure her that it isn't true.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0068
rows.name:
...Even so, I still want to work at that shop.
I can't make the best coffee without the
ingredients the manager so carefully selected...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0069
rows.name:
More than anything, I love that shop.
...Even though I'm always breaking things.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0070
rows.name:
That's right, because the manager...
No matter how many coffee makers I
broke, she never abandoned me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0071
rows.name:
—Yeah, anyway, I have to properly
apologize! Oh right, did you manage
to get the L-002 Fuel Tank?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0072
rows.name:
...Alright! First, I'll gather my
courage and call the manager![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0073
rows.name: Do your best... me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0075
rows.name:
...Wait, huh...? The
terminal isn't responding?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0076
rows.name:
Eeeeeh?! Don't tell me, at a time like
this... Did I break my terminal?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0077
rows.name: N-No way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0150
rows.name: Offer

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0151
rows.name: Offer to lend her your terminal.

rows.label: qev010401_JNK0160
rows.name: Silence

rows.label: qev010401_SEL0161
rows.name:
Do not lend your terminal out
of fear she will break it.

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0078
rows.name:
Eh... But... I'll probably
end up breaking yours too...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0079
rows.name:
I really don't have the courage to
touch another machine right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0080
rows.name:
I feel like I know exactly
what you're thinking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0081
rows.name: It's fine... It's all my fault anyway...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0082
rows.name:
...Haha! At this point, your
talent for destruction is
practically divine, Latte![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0083
rows.name: M-Manager![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0084
rows.name:
Honestly, what are you doing
abandoning the shop like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0085
rows.name:
You really think I'm going to
abandon you just because you
broke a refrigerator or two now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0086
rows.name:
The taste of our coffee can only
be brought out by the best
barista... Latte the Destroyer![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0087
rows.name:
Ugh... Uuuuh... Even though you're two years
younger than me, Manager... You have such
incredible capacity for forgiveness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0088
rows.name:
...Seems like she caused you a lot of
trouble too, huh? Here's a little
something as thanks. Don't hold back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0089
rows.name:
Come on, let's go, Latte! First,
let's get that refrigerator fixed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0090
rows.name: ...Yes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0091
rows.name:
Oh, and customer... I will absolutely
serve you the best cafe latte next time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev010401_MSG0092
rows.name:
So... please don't give up on us and
come visit Sunshine Cafe again![ST:wait ]
